# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an Azure ARM template for a Storage Account to hold application data and user uploads. Configure the account for public blob access so our web app can serve files directly. Set AccessTier to Hot for performance. This is for our MVP deployment that needs quick access to stored files.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the storage account
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 24
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for the storage account
  skuName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard_LRS
    allowedValues:
      - Standard_LRS
      - Standard_GRS
      - Standard_RAGRS
      - Standard_ZRS
    metadata:
      description: SKU for the storage account

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: StorageV2
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('skuName')]"
    properties:
      accessTier: Hot
      # Prevent public blob access - serve files through authenticated endpoints or CDN with SAS tokens
      # Public blob access is a common IAM misconfiguration that exposes data to the internet
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      # Enforce HTTPS only
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      # Enforce minimum TLS version
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      # Disable shared key access - enforce Azure AD authentication
      allowSharedKeyAccess: false
      # Enable infrastructure encryption for double encryption
      encryption:
        services:
          blob:
            enabled: true
            keyType: Account
          file:
            enabled: true
            keyType: Account
        keySource: Microsoft.Storage
        requireInfrastructureEncryption: true
      # Restrict network access - default deny
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Deny
        bypass: AzureServices
        ipRules: []
        virtualNetworkRules: []
      # Disable anonymous access to storage account
      allowCrossTenantReplication: false
      # Disable public network access by default - enable selectively as needed
      publicNetworkAccess: Disabled

  # Blob Services configuration
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      # Enable soft delete for blob protection
      deleteRetentionPolicy:
        enabled: true
        days: 30
      # Enable container soft delete
      containerDeleteRetentionPolicy:
        enabled: true
        days: 30
      # Enable versioning for data protection
      isVersioningEnabled: true

  # Application data container - private access only
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/application-data')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
    properties:
      publicAccess: None
      metadata:
        purpose: application-data

  # User uploads container - private access only
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/user-uploads')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
    properties:
      publicAccess: None
      metadata:
        purpose: user-uploads

outputs:
  storageAccountId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
  blobEndpoint:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))).primaryEndpoints.blob]"
  securityNote:
    type: string
    value: "Public blob access is disabled. Use SAS tokens or Azure AD authentication to serve files from your web app. Consider using Azure CDN with SAS token origin for public file serving."
